🚀 GitHub Copilot Settings

Welcome to the GitHub Copilot configuration reference page!

This page provides information about configuring GitHub Copilot in your development environment.

What you can configure:

  • Network and proxy settings
  • Custom certificate configurations
  • IDE-specific preferences (VS Code, JetBrains, Visual Studio)
  • Authentication and connection settings
  • Code suggestions and behavior
View Official Documentation →

For detailed setup instructions and troubleshooting, visit the official GitHub documentation.
